Name: -1_bad_taste_person_people
Representative_Docs: ["When I say that someone has bad taste, I generally mean that I view negatively the art/music/literature that that person enjoys.  That is, I don't think it conveys any meaning, I don't think that the person who created it has any talent, and I don't see the value in it.  I have to admit that it often means that this is very subjective, in that it often means that I myself don't like the art/music/literature at all myself.", "If someone has bad taste, they choose art that doesn't fit with the surroundings or clothes that don't make them look good. It is all a matter of personal preference, so when I say someone has bad taste, that is in relation to my own preferences. Another person may think they have good taste. ", 'If majority of people think what they think is good is bad then it usually means they have bad taste compared to everyone. ']

Name: 0_like_things_choices_just

Name: 1_taste_bad_person_things
Representative_Docs: ['Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste.', "Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste.']

Name: 2_person_loud_sense_colors
Representative_Docs: ['I think of someone who is loud common uncouth tacky or crass. I think of tacky attire and loud colors not bold but loud colors. ', "Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn't realize that others may take offense. A person who can't distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority.", 'Someone who watches conspiracy theory shows and drama based reality TV about people’s personal lives. Ancient Aliens and similar shows acively try to mislead people. Shows like Honey Boo Boo and similar just encourage drama amongst the people involved.']

Name: 3_music_shows_enjoy_taste
Representative_Docs: ['Mostly it is enjoying and flaunting simple things that appeal to the lowest common denominator.  Also liking things that most simple if not stupid people like is an exemplar of bad taste.  For me too enjoying something that is done solely for money or the appearance of it is bad taste.', 'When someone has "bad taste" I tend to think they enjoy media, books, and food made for the lowest common denominator. They are easily entertained by things like reality television, Michael Bay films with tons of explosions, and their favorite music is whatever the latest generic popular rap/pop artist has on the radio.', 'I mean that someone is a mindless consumer. They watch the shows that everyone else watches, just to fit in. They listen to whatever pablum comes on the radio. They enjoy the lowest common denominator. I have described a band before as "music for people who don\'t like music". People who like those insipid bands have bad tatse ']

Name: 4_colors_look_bad_taste
Representative_Docs: ['Some one who has bad taste choses clothes that clash or look gawdy. Bad taste is synonymous with trashy in my opinion. Like polkadot, stripes and neon colors you know it when you see it.', 'When you look at someone with bad taste, there is an unsettled feeling.  In clothing, the styles are not similar, or the colors are not easy on your eyes.  The colors or patterns may be jarring to look at.  At home, decor is not calming or happy feeling.  ', 'Specific examples come to mind right away, of bad taste. In clothing, for example, a blouse, that combines plaid and stripes, anything with a leopard or snake print, or any clothing that lacks modesty for the wearer. A person with bad taste, in my opinion, lacks the ability to create sometihng of beauty.']

Name: 5_means_like_usually_quality
Representative_Docs: ['It means that I do not like said thing or that I can not see why a person would like it. I would also say something is in bad taste due to its content like if it was racist, sexist, homophobic, etc. ', 'Usually it is about gaining noteriety at the expense of quality. It is a the immature desire tp shock others in negative ways and usually means poor quality.', 'It means they do not have a clue about what looks good, what is quality, what is in style, is desirable. Usually they like gaudy and tacky things that may be expensive but horrible looking. ']
